goal_statement: Enable the decision of whether MIF (Modeled Information Format) should serve as the modeling, provenance, and temporal spine layered with OKF (Google Cloud's Open Knowledge Format) as the accessible git-distributable packaging layer for a foundational research knowledge spine — establishing whether that layering is technically feasible, differentiated from existing knowledge-representation prior art, on a favorable adoption trajectory, and addressed to a real market.

in_scope: The OKF specification's data model (Concepts, Knowledge Bundles, untyped markdown links, frontmatter, timestamps, citations, log.md) and its stated minimalism
MIF capabilities that OKF lacks: typed relationships, formal ontologies, first-class provenance objects, temporal/versioning modeling, EntityReferences
The OKF<->MIF mapping and how MIF's ontology/provenance/temporal layers exploit OKF for greater linking and long-term persistence
Prior art and alternatives: RDF/OWL, PROV-O, SKOS, schema.org, JSON-LD, knowledge graphs, Frictionless Data / Data Packages
Adoption, standards momentum, and AI/LLM-driven knowledge-persistence trends
Market demand drivers, buyer segments, competitive positioning, and sizing for a knowledge-spine offering
out_of_scope: Implementing an OKF<->MIF converter or runtime
non_goals: This session will NOT ship an OKF-MIF integration implementation.
This session will NOT make a procurement or build-vs-buy recommendation for a named vendor.

completion_condition.summary: Each of the four config dimensions (technical >=4, landscape >=3, trajectory >=3, market >=3) carries that many active (non-falsified) citation-backed MIF findings, AND the externally-falsifiable thesis sub-questions (OKF's minimalism; MIF's typed-relationship/provenance/temporal advantage) are each answered by >=1 surviving finding at a survived/weakened verdict, AND every active finding validates against the MIF-backed findings schema, AND the adversarial falsification gate ran exactly once per finding this round, AND citation integrity holds.

checks.assertion: The technical dimension has >=4 active (non-falsified) findings.
checks.verify: ls reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json | xargs -I{} jq -r 'select(.extensions.harness.dimension=="technical" and ((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "survived")!="falsified")) | .["@id"]' {} | sort -u | wc -l prints >= 4

checks.assertion: The landscape dimension has >=3 active (non-falsified) findings.
checks.verify: ls reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json | xargs -I{} jq -r 'select(.extensions.harness.dimension=="landscape" and ((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "survived")!="falsified")) | .["@id"]' {} | sort -u | wc -l prints >= 3

checks.assertion: The trajectory dimension has >=3 active (non-falsified) findings.
checks.verify: ls reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json | xargs -I{} jq -r 'select(.extensions.harness.dimension=="trajectory" and ((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "survived")!="falsified")) | .["@id"]' {} | sort -u | wc -l prints >= 3

checks.assertion: The market dimension has >=3 active (non-falsified) findings.
checks.verify: ls reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json | xargs -I{} jq -r 'select(.extensions.harness.dimension=="market" and ((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "survived")!="falsified")) | .["@id"]' {} | sort -u | wc -l prints >= 3

checks.assertion: OKF being a minimalist markdown format (untyped links, last-modified timestamps, no formal ontology) is established by >=1 surviving finding.
checks.verify: ls reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json | xargs -I{} jq -r 'select(((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "")=="survived") or ((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "")=="weakened")) | select([..|strings]|join(" ")|test("untyped|minimal|markdown|last-modified|no .* ontology";"i")) | .["@id"]' {} | sort -u | wc -l prints >= 1

checks.assertion: MIF providing typed relationships, first-class provenance, and temporal/versioning that OKF lacks is established by >=1 surviving finding.
checks.verify: ls reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json | xargs -I{} jq -r 'select(((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "")=="survived") or ((.extensions.harness.verification.verdict // "")=="weakened")) | select([..|strings]|join(" ")|test("provenance|temporal|typed relationship|ontolog";"i")) | .["@id"]' {} | sort -u | wc -l prints >= 1

checks.assertion: Every active finding validates against the MIF-backed findings schema.
checks.verify: ajv validate --spec=draft2020 --strict=false -c ajv-formats -s schemas/findings.schema.json -r schemas/mif/mif.schema.json -r schemas/mif/definitions/entity-reference.schema.json -d 'reports/example-okf-mif-knowledge-spine/findings/*.json' exits 0

checks.assertion: The adversarial falsification gate ran exactly once per finding this round.
checks.verify: the transcript shows one 'falsification-gate: run' line per finding this round

checks.assertion: Every active finding passes the citation-integrity gate.
